sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἐλιέζερ

- Transliteration: Eliezer

- Phonetic: el-ee-ed'-zer

- Definition: Eliezer = "God is his help"

1. the son of Jorim, in the genealogy of Christ. Lk. 3:29

- Origin: of hebrew origin H461

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H461]; Eliezer an Israelite: - Eliezer.
